faqs.question: Why choose Quad AI School of Technology and Management?
faqs.answer:
Quad AI School of Technology and Management is becoming a popular choice among students. The college is recognised by UGC, AIU, NSDC, NCVET, Startup India, and DPIIT. It is affiliated with Medhavi Skills University (MSU). Courses offered include programmes in UG and PG. Students can choose from Quad AI School of Technology and Management courses in Engineering and Management, among others. The world-class infrastructure at Quad AI School of Technology and Management also attracts a large number of students.
The faculty of Quad AI School of Technology and Management is composed of a large number of PhD holders. The dedicated Placement Cell at Quad AI School of Technology and Management provides valuable training and workshops to equip students to be career-ready. All-in-all, Quad AI School of Technology and Management proves to be a decent selection for the student for quality higher education.

review_summary.college_name: St. Michael College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really good education and friendly staff.

content.Placements: Around 50% or fewer students were placed from our course. Many students secured internships in various companies. Top roles offered in our course were related to research field. About 75% of students secured internships and the lowest salary package offered in our course was 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure available for our course is really good. They have a well-equipped lab with instruments and chemicals. We have free access to use and learn whenever we want. The quality of hostel is good and the food quality is nice but the taste is okay.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: St. Michael College of Engineering and Technology is absolutely a good college.

content.Placements: St. michael college of engineering and technology is one of the best engineering colleges. Placements were very good. Every year, above 95% students got placed in reputed companies. This college conducts so many campus interviews. Salary offered is around 20000-50000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was very nice. Full campus had CCTV camera facility. Departments, laboratories, and library were available at this college. Hostels were very good. Sports grounds and coaching staff were available.
content.Faculty: Faculty members were experienced people and they were highly qualified. They taught very well. Every week, model tests were conducted. They conducted extra curricular activities and programs too. Industry visits were arranged. 95% students passed in all exams.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college is average in placements but excellent in teaching.

content.Placements: The placement record of this college is average and quite low in past years. Only a few students got placements in good companies with top roles, but most of the students fail to get placed in top companies. So, the placement results are average, but in future, it will change.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is above average. However, the infrastructure of the library is excellent, and it is one of the biggest libraries. But the infrastructure of the hostel is quite low as compared to the infrastructure of the college and library.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of faculty members and dissatisfied with the management.

content.Placements: In our college, we are the first batch of mechanical engineering course. There are only 60 students in the first batch. There are a lot of top recruiting companies for our course, but students never get offers from them. Only some below-average companies visit our college for on-campus placements. The top role offered in our course was a design engineer because they provided additional designing course. Some students don't have to give donations, so the salary package offered would be around Rs. 80,000 per year. But companies ask some students for donation, and they have to pay around 1.5 lacs nearly. In our college, during our tenure, we never got an internship through our college. However, we got internships with the help of some good staff members and their guidance.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Life encourages and discourages you all the time, so don't be unmoved.

content.Placements: The placements are not good on the campus, and it is all in your hand. Improve your skills and get placed in off-campus. Here, they only offer startup company placements, so try to get a better job. Designed placement companies in their profile are fake on the campus. Think advanced about your future during your studies.
content.Infrastructure: Good laboratory facilities are available on the campus, and one should use them in a decent manner with knowledgeable skills. The hostel, sports, and all are good.
content.Faculty: The teaching is also good. I can't say negative feedback about teaching staff. The college management is the only major drawback. The faculty members of every department take their responsibility for their teaching. They did their excellent teaching for their earnings. The course is good in the way of theoretical but didn't gain any knowledge practically. Overall, the practical experience is zero when you complete your degree.

reviews.review_heading: Good and nice college for average students.
reviews.review_text: We have so many classroom and we have a classroom for every department on our campus. The Wi-Fi facility is only available in the labs. The quality and the facilities in the hostel are good. We have medical facilities 24/7 on campus. We have a playground and a basketball court where we can play sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: It's something good, not bad.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities are available in our college, and the infrastructure is also good. All labs are available, and they have good knowledge. The mess is also good, and they provide quality food to us and maintain hygiene. They keep sports facilities as well.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied, really good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, etc., are present. The food, snacks, and everything are good. The quality of food is there. Facilities are generally considered good, including the hostels, food, medical facilities, sports, and games. Hostels have fully furnished rooms, RO mineral water, hot water, backup power, paid laundry service, and full-time wardens.

reviews.review_heading: Review of our college, St. Peter's.
reviews.review_text: We have a digital classroom with projectors. The campus has the best facilities for the course. Proper Wi-Fi network. Labs are the best thing we have, we can learn many things from labs, like real machines' work, which is shown to each and every student.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructure are available for our course, including classrooms, computer labs, and the library. I would rate the quality of facilities in our hostels as 3 stars. Good-quality food is available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are available at a hospital near our campus. Good-quality sports rooms are also available.

reviews.review_heading: A quick review - St. Peter's is helpful.
reviews.review_text: The library and canteen are all good. But Wi-Fi doesn't work properly in most places, and it's frustrating. Hostels are pretty decent with a proper gym. So the hostel is definitely okay. Even in sports, there is a lot of equipment available to borrow from the sports room.

reviews.review_heading: Average placements and good facilities on our campus.
reviews.review_text: My department has access to a library and labs with Wi-Fi connectivity to each system. The hostel is very good. The food is also excellent. The rooms are very vacant. Each person has separate ventilation for good airflow in the room. The mess is good and has a weekly lunch scheme that changes the menu every day. The food is fresh and very tasty.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for hard-working students.
reviews.review_text: The college also has different computer labs. We are provided with an internet connection to every computer. Computers are of high standards with i7 processors. Every class has projectors, which are used by the faculty members for teaching. This college also has hostels for both boys and girls at different places.

reviews.review_heading: My college review of St. Peter's College.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very nice. But when it comes to the hostel, the infrastructure is good. But their facilities are not as mentioned, and they don't provide perfect management for a hostel. Coming to our labs and classrooms, everything is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of our Engineering college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in my department are excellent. Wi-Fi, classrooms, and labs are all available for students in the college. The quality and facilities in the hostel are very good, and the canteen food is delicious. Medical and sports facilities are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Students' future is in safe hands.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure available for our department is high-class, and there is no lack of any type of technical issues. The quality of food available in the mess is made through a very hygienic process. Food available in the canteen is not at all good, and the cost is high.

reviews.review_heading: St. Peter's Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: We have very big classrooms, and labs are present here. They are very neat, and every room has a CCTV camera. There is a big library with all the books available. Hostel facilities are available, and the rooms are very beautiful. The quality of food is very nice. There are other canteens and a small medical clinic. Sports facilities are also available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has knowledgeable speakers.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very nice. However, when it comes to hostels, the infrastructure is good, but their facilities are not as mentioned, and they don't provide perfect management. Coming to our labs and classrooms, everything is very good. Labs are well-maintained by teachers, and they provide us with lots of books in the library.

reviews.review_heading: College is strict, placements are good now, and there are no free classes.
reviews.review_text: The equipment is good, except in the Physics lab. The hostels are clean, as they are recently built. Sometimes, the equipment in the Physics lab gives different readings for different professors. They make us believe their method is right, while other faculty give other methods that give different outputs.

reviews.review_heading: There are no fests and no holidays.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is nice and the classrooms are good. Labs are available, but some systems are not working. It is the first campus and is the best compared to the other branches. We have a big playground to play sports and games.

faqs.question: How can candidates join School of Management Studies, Punjabi University?
faqs.answer: The admission process, for Punjab University Patiala for the year 2023 is currently underway. Those interested in joining PUP can apply online. Choose between offline fee submission options. Punjab University is well known for its MBA, BTech and Law programs.To be admitted to the B.Tech programme applicants scores in the JEE Main exam are taken into consideration. For BA, BHM, BPT, MA, MSc or MCA programs merit exams must be cleared. The selection process for the M.Tech programme relies on a GATE score. Admission to MSc Hons, LLM, MCom (Finance) MCom (Hons) Integrated Course, BSc and BSc (Hons) MSc MBA, MEd, MPhil and PhD programs is based on the merit list of the entrance exam.For admission to the MSc (Hons) in Botany programme at Punjab University Patiala requires a NEET score. If any seats remain vacant after admitting candidates through NEET scores those seats are filled based on merit scores, in school 12 exams.

Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

hostel_campus.college_name: SCAD College Of Engineering And Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: My 4-year experience is quite good, placements are good. Overall, I rate this college 4/5.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are commendable across departments, with 24/7 Wi-Fi. The speed is average and it can be rated as 3.5 out of 5. Labs are clean and well-maintained and can be rated as 4.5 out of 5. Classrooms are decent and can be rated as 4 out of 5. Hostel quality is good and rated as 3.8 out of 5. The food in the hostel and canteen is affordable and satisfactory, and it rated as 4 out of 5. Medical facilities include transport to hospital and rated as 4.3 out of 5. Sports events a...

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of SCAD College of Engineering and technology!
reviews.review_text: The campus infrastructure is excellent and there are so many facilities inside the campus. Wi-fi is available in each department. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is good and the food provided in the hostel and the college canteen is healthy. Medical facilities are available on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Great knowledge gained here.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure. Pure water is always available. Food in the hostel is purely good and taste preferable. Laboratory facilities are always available for the students. Classrooms are always neat and clean. Sports is considered one of the major things in college.

reviews.review_heading: You can consider this college if you want to study in Tirunelveli. It's not so bad, not so good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not that good; classrooms are average. The library is good with a decent amount of books. My college doesn't offer free Wi-Fi to students except for computers. Sports and games are the worst. They don't allow us to play sports unless it's sports day, so we can't get proper sports practice. The canteen doesn't offer many varieties, and the food for hostel students is not that good.

reviews.review_heading: Life at SCAD Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure are really good. The department is maintained properly by the management. Classrooms are not equipped with any teaching facilities. The quality of the hostel food is average and the accommodations are good. The canteen and mess facilities are good. Medical and wi-fi facilities are available on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Life at SCAD engineering college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities include Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. The Wi-Fi is high-speed, and the labs are equipped with computers. The quality of food available in the college hostel is average. A medical room is available. Sports and games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: We have a library period every week. Each classroom has many windows, benches, and fans. The food served in the hostel is good. Our college has a canteen. Medical facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because it does not provide good practical experiments.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good atmosphere and infrastructure. Wi-Fi facility is not available, and labs are average. The library and classrooms are good. The hostel is not bad. The food served is average. Our college gives importance to sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for education but not placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are moderate. Lab facilities are not well-maintained. The infrastructure is not bad, but it needs proper maintenance. Wi-Fi is available but limited. The library is a good place for learning. It contains all the books and system facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for education growth.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is awesome, and the scenery was also very beautiful. The college canteen is undertaken by the college, so food was good. Sports also have good involvement.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides many facilities. Placements in 2019 have been good.
reviews.review_text: The college provides many facilities. There are five departments in our college. Physical, technical and non-technical events are conducted here. Manufacturing laboratory, multi-purpose computer lab, advanced electrical equipment and labs are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2024.
reviews.review_text: Labs were very clean and super comfortable to do any practical work. Free Wi-Fi was also available for the learning process. The libraries were perfect, with many course-related books. This made it easy for us to learn anything. In 6 working days, there were 4 vegetarian meals and 2 non-vegetarian meals. The food was also hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure with friendly and supportive staff.
reviews.review_text: Fully equipped lab facilities with internet connection, and they have separate labs for each course and department. Spacious classrooms, seminar halls, and an auditorium. Various authors' books are available in the library. Clean and neat hostel with 3 people in a room. Hostel food is decently good compared to outside food.

reviews.review_heading: I want to know about SCAD engineering and teach it.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the college are good. There are Wi-Fi facilities available on the college campus. Libraries are equipped with a good amount of the latest edition books. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is average. The mess food is average, and the accommodation in the hostel is good. Medical facilities are available in both the hostel and the college. Sports and games are supported by the college's management.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SCAD College Of Engineering And Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good lab and good medical facilities. The college provides good sports facilities and a good gym for the students. Students in the college have won zonal level competitions, mainly weight lifting and powerlifting.
